title: Relay
description: A single relay entry as described by a curator.

added_at.description: Date the relay was first added to the catalog.

collections.description: IDs of the collections this relay belongs to.

country.description: ISO-3166 alpha-2 uppercase country code, or `XX` if unknown.

geohash.description: Optional NIP-52 geohash for finer-grained location (NIP-66 `g`).

name.description: Short human-friendly name; falls back to the URL host when absent.

network.description: Optional curator override for the network transport (NIP-66 `n`). The public JSON instead exposes [`Relay::effective_network`], so this raw override is deserialize-only to avoid emitting a duplicate `network` key.

operator.description: Operator name or pubkey; either an org label or a Nostr npub.

requirements.description: Posting requirements declared by the curator (NIP-66 `R`).

topics.description: Free-form lowercase topics for fine-grained discovery (NIP-66 `t`).

Network.description: Network transport a relay is reachable over (NIP-66 `n` tag).

Requirements.description: Posting requirements a relay enforces, aligned with NIP-66's `R` tag.

auth.description: Requires NIP-42 AUTH before serving reads/writes.

payment.description: Requires payment (admission, subscription, or per-event) to post.

writes.description: Accepts writes from the general public (`false` = read-only/restricted).
